list.name: Changes
list.comment: refactor: reorganize search bar components and update related imports

task.summary: Default task
- web docker worflow
- fixes routing logic for logged in users
- versioning
- Dockerfile improvements for web/admin
- admin next16 upgrade - admin category nominees removal option - recent votes for awards screen
- versioning
- network status listener for react query with capacitor plugin
- typescript fixes
- fixes regression related to collection entry form unused field
- versioning
- versioning
add awards result components and update models for event results
add awards result components and implement event redirection logic
fix: hide your goty category in result screen
chore: versioning
feat: year recap work
feat: year recap work
feat: year recap for mobile
feat: recap sidebar button for mobile
fix: positioning on activity item
feat: obtained achievements in profile view
feat: compact view for achievements list
feat: journal achievements icons expand and collapse
feat: journal achievements listing
chore: versioning
feat: improvements to journal achievements listing
chore: versioning
feat: game achievements activity
feat: add game collection type components and update activity handling
chore: bump version to 1.7.22
feat: integrate error boundary and enhance home page layout with game collection components
feat: add error boundary fallback and refactor activity handling components
feat: update icon components in JournalObtainedAchievementsView
chore: bump version to 1.7.23
feat: add refresher and session authentication to JournalAchievementsPage
feat: app shell work
feat: enhance app shell with new collections menu and navbar updates
feat: update game components for improved layout and navigation
feat: enhance game view components with responsive layout and scroll position management
feat: translation work
feat: translation work
feat: next integration with i18n-next
feat: tidying up portuguese translation
feat: integrate translation functionality and update UI elements
feat: implement LanguageSwitcherMenu component and update navbar integration
feat: supertokens auth for locale routes in nextjs
fix: wrong layout for logo in wrapped generation
refactor: reorganize search bar components and update related imports
